message:
test(mux): add unit tests for DirectMuxClient _with_cx methods and protocol error handling

Add 5 mock-server tests covering: unexpected response type rejection for
get_lines and all _with_cx request methods, connect_with_cx to missing
socket returning SocketNotFound, partial frame reassembly for
list_panes_with_cx confirming codec buffering, and incompatible codec
version rejection via connect_with_cx. All _with_cx tests gated behind
the asupersync-runtime feature.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
